title: Nursery Rhyme. DLXVIII. Natural History.
content:
[A north country version of a very common nursery rhyme, sung by a child, who imitates the crowing of a cock.]

        Cock-a-doodle-do,
        My dad's gane to ploo;
        Mammy's lost her pudding-poke,
        And knows not what to do.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. DLXVIII. Natural History.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
